activities_projects.title: Triangle Construction Using Real-life Data
activities_projects.objective: Construct triangles based on real measurements from objects
steps: Measure three distances between objects forming a triangle in your surroundings
Construct a triangle using SSS or SAS rule
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies triangle construction to real-world data

activities_projects.title: Area Comparison Using Different Methods
activities_projects.objective: Compare area calculated using different formulas
steps: Draw a triangle and measure sides and height

activities_projects.title: Verification of Triangle Inequalities
activities_projects.objective: Verify inequalities of triangle sides and angles
steps: Draw a triangle with random sides
Verify that sum of any two sides is greater than third side
Verify that larger angle is opposite to longer side

activities_projects.title: Altitude, Median, and Centroid Project
activities_projects.objective: Explore intersection points of triangle lines
steps: Observe relationships between altitudes and medians

activities_projects.title: Incentre and Circumcircle Exploration
activities_projects.objective: Construct incentre and circumcircle and analyze properties
steps: Construct angle bisectors to find incentre
Construct perpendicular bisectors to find circumcenter
Observe distances from centers to vertices and sides

activities_projects.title: Application of Pythagoras Theorem
activities_projects.objective: Solve real-life problems using right triangles
steps: Identify right triangles in surroundings (e.g., ladder against wall)
Use Pythagoras theorem to calculate unknown lengths
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies theorem to solve practical problems

activities_projects.title: Similarity Project
activities_projects.objective: Investigate similar triangles in daily life
steps: Find objects forming triangles (e.g., roof, signs)
Classify triangles as similar if ratios match
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification and ratio comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Area Using Altitudes
steps: Calculate area using 1/2 × base × corresponding height for each side
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands area invariance with different bases

activities_projects.title: Exploring Right Triangle Trigonometry
activities_projects.objective: Apply trigonometric ratios to right triangles
steps: Calculate sin, cos, and tan ratios

activities_projects.title: Project: Designing a Triangular Garden
activities_projects.objective: Apply all triangle concepts in a practical design
steps: Plan a triangular garden of specific dimensions
Calculate perimeter, area, and plot locations of trees using medians or incentre
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Integrates geometry concepts in real-life project
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy, design clarity, and application (10 marks)
